<!--
Before opening this PR, please skim CONTRIBUTING.md.
Fill in the sections below; delete the ones that don't apply.
-->

## What's being added or changed

<!-- One sentence. For an addition: link to the project. For a removal/fix: link to the line being changed. -->

## Why is this awesome for an Apps Script developer?

<!--
One or two sentences answering: what does this give a GAS developer that the list doesn't already cover?
"It's a wrapper for X API" is not enough -- say what makes it worth a reader's attention.
-->

## Section

<!-- Which section did you add the entry to, and why is that the right one? If you weren't sure between two, say which alternatives you considered. -->

## Disclosure

<!-- Are you the author of, or affiliated with, the project? If yes, say so. If no, you can delete this section. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The entry follows the format `* [Title](URL) Description` with no trailing period.
- [ ] The description language matches the resource: English if the resource has an English version, otherwise the original language of the resource.
- [ ] All links resolve; the linked repository has an OSI-approved license.
- [ ] The project is usable without paying the author or signing up for the author's commercial service.
- [ ] If I added a new top-level section, I also updated the `<!-- toc -->` block and added a `[goto top ⇑](#google-apps-script-list)` link.
- [ ] My diff contains only the lines I'm actually adding (no whitespace churn or reflow).
- [ ] One entry per PR (I'll split if I have more than one unrelated addition).
